01. About Me

Professional Identity

I am a highly motivated 3rd-year B.Sc. IT student at GLS University, striving to make my mark as a Full-Stack AI Developer. My goal is to build intelligent, beautifully designed applications that merge robust backend intelligence with state-of-the-art interactive frontends.

I have experience building projects such as CampusFind, RFID Attendance System, AI-powered assistants, and responsive web applications. My technical stack includes React, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, JavaScript, Python, Java, C++, SQL, Git, and GitHub. I love exploring artificial intelligence, cloud technologies, and scalable software architecture.

I thrive at the intersection of AI, modern UI/UX design, and 3D web experiences. I love transforming complex ideas into user-friendly digital solutions.
